title: Kernera ovalis

intro: Kernera ovalis, also known as bog bean, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Kernera ovalis include isothiocyanates, glucosinolates, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
